display.name: Bring Proof from the Barricade
display.short_description: The hamlet wants hard proof that the ash barricade threat was broken before it opens the heavy stores.

rules.briefing_text: Break the marked barricade threat and bring back proof. The hamlet will only open its stronger stores once the evidence is in hand.
rules.accepted_text: The marked pocket is live now. Finish it, collect proof, then return here for payment.
rules.completed_text: The proof is in hand. Choose one payment before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The barricade proof was already turned in. This request is settled.
